ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-06-2019 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-25-2019 Continued To May-06-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Patricia Andersson appeared by telephone for James Connell (Executor).

Ms. Andersson requested a continuance stating that she has contacted her Client's Accountant, that she has requested documents/receipts and the Accountant will not be able to get to it until after April 15th. Status on close of estate is continued to May 6, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court informed Ms. Andersson that she needs to file either a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration by that date. The order to appear is off calendar.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Mar-25-2019 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-11-2019 Continued To Mar-25-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney to appear on March 25, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he failed to appear and why a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration have not been filed. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
